title: Non-record: LapushBaby stock baseline 1xGPU RunPod
body:
## Summary

This is a non-record submission documenting a reproducible single-GPU RunPod run using the stock root `train_gpt.py` copied into the submission folder.

Key result:
- `final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb: 1.36294332`
- `val_loss: 2.30127271`
- total submission size: `12,264,252` bytes

## Setup

- Dataset: FineWeb `sp1024`
- Train shards: 10
- Hardware: 1x GPU on RunPod
- Wallclock cap: 600 seconds

## Repro command

```bash
RUN_ID=real_10min \
DATA_PATH=./data/datasets/fineweb10B_sp1024/ \
TOKENIZER_PATH=./data/tokenizers/fineweb_1024_bpe.model \
VOCAB_SIZE=1024 \
MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600 \
VAL_LOSS_EVERY=0 \
torchrun --standalone --nproc_per_node=1 train_gpt.py
